title: MelonPack
description: Just that random Texture Pack out there!
body:
# Welcome to Melonpack Do you like Melons? Do you like Minecraft texture packs? If so, this pack is for you! This pack makes most things melon! Melons? MELON! tools? MELON! hotbar? MELON!

FEATURES INCLUDED ARE

  • Watermelon tools
  • Watermelon Armor
  • Easy Brewing
  • Melon Particles
  • Melon Health
  • AND MUCH MORE
# Info/Contact

Click here for discord!

Contact me at "abstractmelons@gmail.com" OR "abstractmelon#0115"

We hope you enjoy the Pack:)
